# Slice T003-I0-C — commands 瘦身

**May edit:** `apps/trader-cli/src/commands/report.ts`, `chart.ts`, `scan.ts`, `data.ts`, `server.ts`

**Do NOT edit:** `tui/**`, `services/**`（仅 import）

**Acceptance:** `trader data status` 调用 GET `/market/status`，不 POST ingest（读 services/market.ts）
